_provenance.estimation_method: Heuristic proportional split of the published 8056 s total, preserving the plan's ~75% ZkShareEncryption share and ~85% PVSS-proof-cluster share.

circuit_timings.name: ZkPkBfv
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 2% share of the published 8056 s total; PK-share well-formedness is secondary to share encryption in the plan narrative.

circuit_timings.name: ZkShareComputation
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 1% share of the published 8056 s total; small standalone share-computation cost.

circuit_timings.name: ZkShareEncryption
circuit_timings.note: Plan-source published figure: approximately 75% of DKG cost is concentrated in ZkShareEncryption.

circuit_timings.name: ZkVerifyShareProofs
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 6% share so the PVSS proof cluster (share encryption + verify + decrypt-side proofs) sums to approximately 85% of the published total.

circuit_timings.name: ZkNodeDkgFold
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 2% share for the first node-fold stage outside the PVSS-proof-dominated portion.

circuit_timings.name: ZkPkAggregation
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 1% share for the PK aggregation step.

circuit_timings.name: ZkDkgAggregation
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 3% share for the final DKG aggregation SNARK.

circuit_timings.name: ZkThresholdShareDecryption
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 3% share for threshold-share decryption proofs.

circuit_timings.name: ZkDkgShareDecryption
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 4% share to keep the PVSS proof cluster near the plan's stated approximately 85% of DKG cost.

circuit_timings.name: ZkDecryptionAggregation
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 1% share for final decryption aggregation.

circuit_timings.name: OnChainUltraHonkVerify
circuit_timings.note: Heuristic 1% share for the on-chain UltraHonk verification step; Interfold's published circuit name differs from PVTHFHE's onchain_verify row label.
